TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Sedeng, title = Sedeng, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sedeng} }

S.FORM: Sedeng Itiniay i Yuli Cen no Hualien ko Sedeng a niyaro', 225 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 639 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 33% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 214 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 67% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 425 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis28%, Bunun3%, 撒奇拉雅族1%, Puyuma1%, roma1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Sedeng(Sowal no Holam: 咬人貓)
S.PHON: səɬ~ɮəŋ itiniaj i jo~u~uɾi ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u səɬ~ɮəŋ a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis**%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, ******%, po~u~ujo~u~uma*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. səɬ~ɮəŋ(so~uwaɾ no~u ħo~uɾam: ***)
S.FORM: Sedeng Itiniay i Yuli Cen no Hualien ko Sedeng a niyaro', 225 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 639 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 33% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 214 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 67% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 425 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis28%, Bunun3%, 撒奇拉雅族1%, Puyuma1%, roma1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Sedeng(Sowal no Holam: 咬人貓)
S.PHON: səɬ~ɮəŋ itiniaj i jo~u~uɾi ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u səɬ~ɮəŋ a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis**%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, ******%, po~u~ujo~u~uma*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. səɬ~ɮəŋ(so~uwaɾ no~u ħo~uɾam: ***)
